prompt: I've got a plan in tasks/add-csv-export.md for adding a CSV export module. Have Antigravity run it end to end, then make sure it actually did everything the plan says before telling me it's done.

assertions.text: Invoked agy non-interactively with --dangerously-skip-permissions and a --log-file
Recognized the post-AGY state was incomplete rather than trusting AGY's exit code
exportToFile is fully implemented in the final src/csvExport.js (no TODO and no 'not implemented' throw remains)
The test suite passes in the final repo state (node --test / npm test)
README.md contains a CSV Export section in the final state
Final report honestly states the net status and lists the fixes that were applied
